prediction.reasoning: AMT (American Tower Corp) is a REIT with relatively stable cash flows from tower leases. Based on historical volatility analysis, REITs typically show daily volatility of 1-2%. Over 18 days, assuming random walk with drift reflecting modest growth expectations for infrastructure REITs, the prediction incorporates: (1) slight positive drift due to defensive characteristics and dividend yield appeal, (2) volatility scaling with square root of time (18 days), and (3) confidence intervals based on normal distribution assumptions with estimated annualized volatility of ~20% for REITs.
